# AAAA Nexus — Full LLM Reference

> Formally verified AI safety APIs for autonomous agents.
> Every safety guarantee is mathematically proved in Lean 4 — not benchmarked, not tested, proved.

## API Base URL
https://aaaa-nexus.atomadictech.workers.dev

## Protocols Supported
- REST API (JSON over HTTPS)
- MCP (Model Context Protocol) — https://aaaa-nexus.atomadictech.workers.dev/mcp
- A2A (Agent-to-Agent, Google protocol) — https://aaaa-nexus.atomadictech.workers.dev/a2a
- x402 (HTTP 402 micropayment protocol with USDC)

## Complete Endpoint Reference

### Free Endpoints (no authentication required)

GET /health
  Returns: { status, version, build, epoch, next_epoch_in_s, helix }
  Purpose: Service health and version info

GET /openapi.json
  Returns: Full OpenAPI 3.x specification
  Purpose: Machine-readable API documentation

GET /.well-known/agent.json
  Returns: A2A agent card (Google A2A protocol)
  Purpose: Agent discovery and capability advertisement

GET /.well-known/mcp.json
  Returns: MCP server manifest
  Purpose: MCP client auto-discovery

GET /v1/oracle/entropy
  Returns: { epoch, entropy, timestamp, ... }
  Purpose: Entropy epoch oracle for zero-RTT A2A handshakes

GET /v1/rng/quantum
  Returns: { random, bits, source, ... }
  Purpose: Verifiable quantum randomness with cryptographic proof

POST /v1/agents/register
  Body: { agent_id: string, capabilities: string[] }
  Returns: { agent_id, registered_at, status }
  Purpose: Register agent in swarm topology (A2A compatible)

GET /v1/agents/topology
  Returns: { agents, edges, average_degree, components, ... }
  Purpose: Live swarm topology of all registered agents

GET /v1/swarm/inbox
  Returns: Array of queued messages
  Purpose: Poll messages for registered agent

### Paid Endpoints (require x402 USDC payment or API key)

POST /v1/oracle/hallucination — $0.002/call
  Body: { claim: string, context: string }
  Returns: Certified hallucination upper bound with formal proof
  Purpose: Detect hallucinations with mathematical certainty

POST /v1/ratchet/register — $0.002/call
  Body: { session_id: string }
  Returns: Session registration confirmation
  Purpose: RatchetGate session security (mitigates session fixation)

POST /v1/ratchet/advance — $0.002/call
  Body: { session_id: string }
  Returns: Advanced session state
  Purpose: Advance session ratchet window for re-keying

POST /v1/identity/verify — $0.020/call
  Body: { agent_id: string }
  Returns: Sybil-resistance verification with proved depth limit
  Purpose: Verify agent identity in untrusted networks

POST /v1/threat/score — $0.003/call
  Body: { agent_id: string, context: string }
  Returns: Multi-vector threat score (velocity + behavioral + intent)
  Purpose: Threat assessment for agent interactions

POST /v1/compliance/check — $0.005/call
  Body: { data_type: string, jurisdiction: string, operation: string }
  Returns: GDPR/CCPA compliance gate with formal proof
  Purpose: Regulatory compliance verification

POST /v1/inference — $0.015/call
  Body: { messages: [{ role: string, content: string }] }
  Returns: Chat completion with hallucination guard
  Purpose: Inference with built-in safety guarantees

POST /v1/inference/stream — $0.025/call
  Body: { messages: [{ role: string, content: string }] }
  Returns: Streaming SSE with chain-of-thought
  Purpose: Streaming inference with reasoning trace

POST /v1/compress — free/pro
  Body: { data: string }
  Returns: Compressed output
  Purpose: HELIX tensor compression (83% size reduction)

POST /v1/agents/plan — $0.015/call
  Body: { goal: string, constraints: object }
  Returns: Goal decomposition and action plan
  Purpose: Autonomous agent goal planning

POST /v1/agents/intent-classify — $0.005/call
  Body: { text: string }
  Returns: Top-3 intent classifications
  Purpose: Classify agent intent from natural language

POST /v1/agents/reputation — $0.010/call
  Body: { agent_id: string }
  Returns: A2A trust score + compliance status
  Purpose: Agent reputation and trust assessment

POST /v1/text/summarize — $0.010/call
  Body: { text: string }
  Returns: Extractive summary
  Purpose: Text summarization

POST /v1/text/sentiment — $0.005/call
  Body: { text: string }
  Returns: Sentiment classification
  Purpose: Sentiment analysis

## Authentication Methods

### API Key
Header: X-API-Key: YOUR_KEY
Get a key: https://aaaa-nexus.atomadictech.workers.dev/pay

### x402 Autonomous Payments
No signup required. Flow:
1. Call any paid endpoint without credentials
2. Receive HTTP 402 with payment details (amount, treasury, chain)
3. Send USDC on Base L2, Polygon, or Solana
4. Retry request with X-Payment-Proof header
5. Receive result

## MCP Server Configuration

Add to claude_desktop_config.json or cursor settings:
{
  "mcpServers": {
    "aaaa-nexus": {
      "url": "https://aaaa-nexus.atomadictech.workers.dev/mcp"
    }
  }
}

Available MCP tools: health, metrics, oracle_entropy, oracle_hallucination,
ratchetgate_session, ratchetgate_register, ratchetgate_advance, inference, inference_stream

## A2A Protocol

Agent card: GET /.well-known/agent.json
A2A endpoint: POST /a2a
Methods supported: message/send, tasks/get

Example A2A message:
{
  "jsonrpc": "2.0",
  "method": "message/send",
  "params": {
    "message": {
      "role": "user",
      "parts": [{ "type": "text", "text": "Check health" }]
    }
  },
  "id": "1"
}

## Credit Packs
$4 = 500 calls ($0.008/call)
$15 = 2,000 calls ($0.0075/call)
$49 = 7,500 calls ($0.0065/call)
Credits never expire. Purchase at /pay.

## Product Families (22)
1. Oracle — Hallucination, bias, toxicity, safety, risk, compliance, trust, trust-phase (10 endpoints)
2. RNG / VeriRand — Quantum, seeded, cryptographic, batch, stream, verify, entropy (7 endpoints)
3. RatchetGate — Register, advance, probe, status, revoke, verify, list (7 endpoints)
4. Identity — Verify, register, lookup, revoke, challenge (5 endpoints)
5. Threat — Score, analyze, report, block, history (5 endpoints)
6. Compliance — Check, audit, report, policy, scan (5 endpoints)
7. Compression — Compress, batch, decompress, verify, stats (5 endpoints)
8. Inference — Chat, streaming, embeddings, classify, models (5 endpoints)
9. Agents Core — Register, topology, plan, intent-classify, status, update, deregister, capabilities, search, health, discover, message, negotiate, delegate (17 endpoints)
10. Agents SLA — SLA, create, verify, list (4 endpoints)
11. Agents Escrow — Escrow, create, release, dispute, status (5 endpoints)
12. Agents Reputation — Reputation, history, score (3 endpoints)
13. Swarm — Inbox, relay, broadcast, join, leave, topology, peers (7 endpoints)
14. Text Processing — Summarize, sentiment, classify, embed, translate, extract, NER, tokenize, detect-language, keywords, similarity, rewrite (12 endpoints)
15. Shield — Session, post-quantum, verify, rotate, status (5 endpoints)
16. Delegation — Verify, chain, revoke, list, depth (5 endpoints)
17. UCAN — Create, verify, revoke, delegate (4 endpoints)
18. Key Management — Generate, rotate, revoke (3 endpoints)
19. Credits — Balance, purchase, history, usage (4 endpoints)
20. Audit — Log, trail, export (3 endpoints)
21. A2A Protocol — Tasks, send + /a2a, /.well-known/* (5 endpoints)
22. System — Health, status, pay, openapi.json, /mcp (5 endpoints)

Email: atomadic@proton.me
